extract: Ancient Quarry (Japanese: 古代の石切り場 Ancient Quarry) is an area located in the southern region of the Coronet Highlands of Hisui. It connects Wayward Wood with Sonorous Path. It has two parts: a quarry inside a mountain and a flatland atop the mountain. The top of the mountain is reachable with the help of Ride Sneasler or Braviary. According to Ingo, the stones used to construct the Temple of Sinnoh at the summit of Mount Coronet were derived from the Ancient Quarry.
